kirundi.use_modus_ponens_p_q_and_p_gives_q: Koresha Modus Ponens: P→Q na P bitanga Q
kirundi.use_modus_tollens_p_q_and_q_gives_p: Koresha Modus Tollens: P→Q na ¬Q bitanga ¬P
kirundi.hs_chains_p_q_and_q_r_then_mp_with_p: HS ihuza P→Q na Q→R, hanyuma MP na P
kirundi.disjunctive_syllogism_p_q_and_p_gives_: Silogisme yo gutandukanya: P∨Q na ¬P bitanga Q
kirundi.conjunction_gives_p_q_then_modus_ponen: Guhuza bitanga P∧Q, hanyuma Modus Ponens itanga R
kirundi.chain_p_q_and_q_r_with_hs_then_again_w: Huza P→Q na Q→R ukoresheje HS, hanyuma kandi na R→S, hanyuma MP
kirundi.mt_on_p_q_gives_p_then_ds_on_p_r_gives: MT kuri P→Q itanga ¬P, hanyuma DS kuri P∨R itanga R
kirundi.hs_gives_p_r_then_mt_with_r_gives_p: HS itanga P→R, hanyuma MT na ¬R itanga ¬P
kirundi.truth_tables_every_input_combination_e: Imbonerahamwe y'ukuri — buri guhuza kw'ibyinjira, buri gisohoka
kirundi.for_n_variables_the_table_has_2_rows_a: Kuri variyabuli n, imbonerahamwe ifite imirongo 2ⁿ. AND, OR, NOT, XOR, IFF — buri rembo ni inkingi imwe gusa. Aljebura ya Boolean (Boole, 1854) ni urufatiro rwa buri muyoboro wa dijitari, buri kibazo cyo gushaka, na buri gihe mu kode.
kirundi.proof_builder_derive_conclusions_step_: Uwubaka ibihamya — kura imyanzuro intambwe ku yindi
kirundi.modus_ponens_modus_tollens_hypothetica: Modus ponens, modus tollens, silogisme y'igitekerezo, silogisme yo gutandukanya — amategeko umunani yo gukurikiza akubiyemo igice kinini cya lojiki y'interuro y'intangiriro. Buri ntambwe yiyemeza binyuze ku IZINA, atari ku marangamutima.
kirundi.challenges_graded_tautology_contradict: Imbogamizi — ibisakuzo bya tautology n'ukwivuguruza biri ku rwego
kirundi.tautology_always_true_contradiction_al: Tautology = ukuri buri gihe; ukwivuguruza = ikinyoma buri gihe; uko byagenda kose = rimwe na rimwe byombi. Itegeko rya Aristote ryo kutivuguruza (350 MIK) ni itegeko rya kera cyane ryasohotse. Imyitozo ya AP CS Principles + intangiriro y'imibare itandukanye.
kirundi.logic_gates_transistors_all_the_way_do: Amarembo ya lojiki — transistor kugeza hasi
kirundi.nand_is_functionally_complete_you_can_: NAND yujuje imikorere — ushobora kubaka buri rindi rembo ukoresheje NAND yonyine. CPU igezweho ifite transistor zigera kuri miliyari 10 zikora imibare ya Boolean imwe uri kubaka hano.
kirundi.probability_logic_inference_under_unce: Lojiki y'amahirwe — gukurikiza mu buryo budasobanutse
kirundi.p_and_q_each_carry_a_probability_inste: P na Q buri kimwe gifite amahirwe aho kuba ukuri/ikinyoma bikomeye. Ku bintu byigenga, P(P∧Q) = P(P) × P(Q). Reba uko urugero rw'icyizere ruhindura amahirwe yoroshye akaba gukurikiza gutandukanye.
kirundi.drag_tiles_or_click_to_add: Kurura ama tile cyangwa kanda kugira ngo wongereho
kirundi.drop_symbols_here_or_click_above: Rekura ibimenyetso hano cyangwa kanda hejuru…
kirundi.enter_an_expression_above_to_generate_: Injiza imvugo hejuru kugira ngo ukore imbonerahamwe y'ukuri
kirundi.contingency_sometimes_true: ⚠️ Uko byagenda kose (rimwe na rimwe ukuri)
kirundi.logiclab_data_table: imbonerahamwe y'amakuru ya laboratwari ya lojiki
kirundi.drag_or_click_to_select: Kurura cyangwa kanda kugira ngo uhitemo
kirundi.drag_or_click_to_select_2: Kurura cyangwa kanda kugira ngo uhitemo
kirundi.your_interests_basketball_cooking_vide: Ibyo ukunda (basketball, guteka, imikino ya videwo...)
kirundi.your_interests_for_ai_personalization: Ibyo ukunda kugira ngo AI ikorere wowe
kirundi.ai_generated_is_this_argument_valid: AI yakoze: iyi mpaka ifite ishingiro?
kirundi.can_we_conclude_the_butler_is_innocent: Twashobora gufata umwanzuro ko umukozi atariho icyaha?
kirundi.can_we_conclude_the_creature_has_no_wi: Twashobora gufata umwanzuro ko ikiremwa kidafite amababa?
kirundi.can_we_conclude_no_dark_clouds: Twashobora gufata umwanzuro ko nta bicu byirabura?
kirundi.toggle_inputs_to_see_the_output_live: Hindura ibyinjira kugira ngo urebe igisohoka ako kanya
kirundi.sliders_for_p_q_truth_probabilities_co: Ama slider y'amahirwe y'ukuri ya P, Q n'urugero rw'icyizere. Igisubizo cyo gukurikiza gutandukanye cy'imiterere 4. Nta manota, nta guhishura.
kirundi.independence_vs_correlation_when_does_: Ubwigenge vs. isano — buri kimwe gikora ryari?
kirundi.how_does_threshold_change_inference_ou: Urugero ruhindura gute igisubizo cyo gukurikiza?
kirundi.design_note_discrete_4_state_inference: Inyandiko y'igishushanyo: ikimenyetso cyo gukurikiza gutandukanye cy'imiterere 4; nta manota y'amahirwe; nta guhishura — kubishaka.
kirundi.toggle_educational_panel_what_is_propo: Hindura urubaraza rw'uburezi: Lojiki y'interuro ni iki?
kirundi.propositional_logic_studies_how_the_tr: Lojiki y'interuro yiga uburyo ukuri kw'imvugo zigoye kuterwa n'izoroshye.
kirundi.is_any_statement_that_is_either_true_o: ni imvugo iyo ari yo yose iri ukuri cyangwa ikinyoma — nka «Imvura iragwa» cyangwa «2 + 2 = 4».
kirundi.argument_guarantees_the_conclusion_if_: impaka itanga umwanzuro NIBA ibyatangiwe ari ukuri.
kirundi.argument_fallacy_has_a_logical_gap_eve: impaka (ikosa rya lojiki) ifite icyuho cya lojiki — n'iyo ibyatangiwe ari ukuri, umwanzuro ntukurikira ku gahato.
kirundi.common_fallacies_affirming_the_consequ: Amakosa ya lojiki akunze kugaragara: kwemeza igikurikira (P→Q, Q ∴ P✗), guhakana ibanziriza (P→Q, ¬P ∴ ¬Q✗)
kirundi.truth_tables_boolean_logic_at_a_glance: 🔍 Imbonerahamwe y'ukuri — lojiki ya Boolean mu kanya
kirundi.truth_table_visualization_cycling_thro: Igaragaza ry'imbonerahamwe y'ukuri rizenguruka mu marembo ya lojiki AND, OR, XOR na NAND.
